shared_properties: Projectile sheet stays on transparent background and is authored for fast readability over the academy lane art.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while electric bolt colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
The effect stays within a compact frame so high travel speed does not create UI overlap.
differences: Six frames animate a narrow lightning spear with a bright core, forked front, and a short saw-tooth wake.
The silhouette is elongated rather than circular so players can instantly distinguish it from the fire orb.
Frame-to-frame edge shifts create a jittery electric cadence that supports the faster 320 px per second travel profile.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load projectile_thunder_lance.png during Loading and build a 3x2 TextureAtlasLayout for lightning projectile spawns.
runtime_notes: Animate at 14 FPS so the bolt feels more volatile than the fire orb.
Keep the authored travel direction right-to-left with no runtime rotation requirement.
Preserve enough transparent margin around the bolt tips so additive glow shaders do not clip.

context.usage: Spawned from advanced enemy casts that demand a faster read than the fire orb pattern.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 288x96 px for six 96x48 frames with no frame gutter.
The projectile reads as a lightning attack from silhouette and color alone at 50% preview scale.
The forward-facing point remains clearly sharper than the wake in every frame.
